title: Build Ticket Detail Panel with CRUD Operations
description: Create a slide-out panel or modal for viewing and editing ticket details. Display all fields: title, description (markdown rendered), type, priority, complexity, parent ticket, dependencies, acceptance criteria (checklist), agent history. Include edit mode with form validation and delete with confirmation.
acceptance_criteria: Panel slides in from right with backdrop blur on main content
View mode shows all ticket fields with proper formatting
Description rendered as markdown using react-markdown
Edit mode toggles fields to form inputs with validation
Acceptance criteria rendered as interactive checkboxes
Dependencies shown as linked ticket chips (clickable)
Delete button shows confirmation modal before action
Save and Cancel buttons with unsaved changes warning
Agent history shows list of agents that worked on ticket
agent_output: Ticket detail panel with full CRUD, status/priority selectors, agent assignment, and delete functionality.
